concerns.text: SC-001 specifies empirical thresholds (≥2 percentage points, p<0.05) that should be deferred per spec template guidance. Planning docs state WHAT is measured and against WHICH reference, not pre-asserted numbers. Consider marking as [deferred] or removing specific thresholds.

SC-002 specifies empirical thresholds (≤90% median time, p<0.05) that should be deferred per spec template guidance. Planning docs state WHAT is measured and against WHICH reference, not pre-asserted numbers. Consider marking as [deferred] or removing specific thresholds.

SC-003 specifies empirical thresholds (≤95% token count, ≥80% of problems) that should be deferred per spec template guidance. Planning docs state WHAT is measured and against WHICH reference, not pre-asserted numbers. Consider marking as [deferred] or removing specific thresholds.
SC-005 correctly uses [deferred] marker for drop rate threshold, which aligns with spec template guidance. This is the correct pattern for other SCs.
